spec.doc: Parcel Post and Express Post - Label & Barcode Specification v1.4

rules.title: Express Post header branding
rules.description: Express Post labels must carry the Express Post header. The yellow header colour identifies the product at lodgement; a black-and-white label requires Express Post tape on the parcel.

messages.pass: Express Post header text was found: {actual}. Confirm the yellow header colour on the preview.
messages.fail: Header text does not indicate Express Post: {actual}. Confirm the product header on the preview.
messages.missing: Product header text was not extracted. Confirm the Express Post header (and its yellow colour) visually on the preview.
